owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: Tray smoke now fail-closed checks empty owner_test_playbook_path in the baseline state; next bounded work is a positive ready-state tray verification for that contract

chunks.title: Add ready-state tray playbook verification
chunks.goal: Add a bounded verification path that proves tray JSON exposes owner_test_playbook_path when the monthly reactive owner-test contract is genuinely ready.
acceptance: A targeted verification path or fixture proves tray JSON exposes owner_test_playbook_path = docs/MONTHLY_REACTIVE_OWNER_TEST_PLAYBOOK.md in the ready owner-test state.
The verification reads the top-level field directly instead of reconstructing readiness from status_center_summary_text.
The existing non-ready tray smoke baseline remains fail-closed.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after ready tray playbook verification
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and today's owner-facing daily summary aligned after ready-state tray verification for owner_test_playbook_path lands.
acceptance: Roadmap notes mention the shipped ready-state tray verification for owner_test_playbook_path.
The sprint queue advances to the next missing bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving the ready-state tray verification chunk as the head item.
The daily freework report for 2026-06-06 is replaced, not duplicated.
